Class DAUtils

java.lang.Object
org.novastack.iposca.cust.debt.DAUtils
public class DAUtils extends Object
Utility class for DebtAutomationService

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    protected static final record 
    DAUtils.DebtWarrant
    Record that stores the customer ID and balance of a debt that requires a state change.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected static boolean
    check1stReminderExists(CustomerDebt debt)
    Checks if a first reminder hasn't been issued yet by checking if the reminder status and date are null.
    protected static boolean
    check2ndReminderExists(CustomerDebt debt)
    Checks if a second reminder hasn't been issued yet.
    protected static ArrayList<DAUtils.DebtWarrant>
    checkBalances()
    Checks balances of all customers with unpaid debts and returns a list of those customers.
    protected static String
    firstReminderPush(LocalDate date)
    Pushes the issuance of the first reminder forward by 5 days from when an unpaid debt has been escalated.
    protected static boolean
    postSuspended(CustomerDebt debt)
    Check that the second reminder has been sent and that it is the last day of the month, so that if the debt still remains unpaid, the account status of the debtor will change from suspended to in-default.
    protected static String
    secondReminderPush(LocalDate firstSentDate)
    Pushes the issuance of the second reminder forward by 15 days from when the first reminder has been sent.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • DAUtils

      public DAUtils()

  • Method Details

    • checkBalances

      protected static ArrayList<DAUtils.DebtWarrant> checkBalances()
      Checks balances of all customers with unpaid debts and returns a list of those customers.
      Returns:
      A list of DAUtils.DebtWarrant objects representing customers with pending balances.

    • check1stReminderExists

      protected static boolean check1stReminderExists(CustomerDebt debt)
      Checks if a first reminder hasn't been issued yet by checking if the reminder status and date are null.
      Parameters:
      debt - The customer's debt to check.
      Returns:
      True if the first reminder hasn't been issued yet, false otherwise.

    • check2ndReminderExists

      protected static boolean check2ndReminderExists(CustomerDebt debt)
      Checks if a second reminder hasn't been issued yet. The first requirement is that there is atleast a status for the first reminder. The second requirement is that the first reminder has the status of SENT. The final requirement is that the second reminder is null.
      Parameters:
      debt - The customer's debt to check.
      Returns:
      True if the second reminder hasn't been issued yet, false otherwise.

    • firstReminderPush

      protected static String firstReminderPush(LocalDate date)
      Pushes the issuance of the first reminder forward by 5 days from when an unpaid debt has been escalated.
      Parameters:
      date - The date of the escalation.
      Returns:
      The string of the date of the first reminder.

    • postSuspended

      protected static boolean postSuspended(CustomerDebt debt)
      Check that the second reminder has been sent and that it is the last day of the month, so that if the debt still remains unpaid, the account status of the debtor will change from suspended to in-default.
      Parameters:
      debt - The customer's debt to check.
      Returns:
      True if the second reminder has been sent and is the last day of the month, false otherwise.

    • secondReminderPush

      protected static String secondReminderPush(LocalDate firstSentDate)
      Pushes the issuance of the second reminder forward by 15 days from when the first reminder has been sent.
      Parameters:
      firstSentDate - The date of the first reminder.
      Returns:
      The string of the date of the second reminder.
